item.name: Webhooks (moved to integration-service)
item.description: These endpoints have moved to integration-service (port 3008). See the Integration folder.

item.name: Create Reservation
item.description: Consumes the hold created by 'Place Hold'. Run 'Place Hold' first so {{hold_id}} is populated.

item.name: Holds
item.description: Provisional cart — a hold is placed at room-selection time (before the booking form). POST /holds increments inventory held_rooms atomically and returns a 15-minute holdId. POST /reservations then consumes the hold via Redis GETDEL.

item.name: Place Hold
item.description: Step 1 — user selects a room. Increments inventory held_rooms. Returns holdId + expiresAt (15 min). Saves hold_id for use in 'Create Reservation'.

item.name: Place Hold (duplicate — idempotent)
item.description: Send the same request again. Returns 200 with the same holdId — inventory is NOT double-held.

item.name: Release Hold
item.description: User navigates away — explicitly releases the hold. Decrements inventory held_rooms. Returns 204. If the hold was already consumed by 'Create Reservation' (Redis key gone), returns 404.

item.name: Integration
item.description: integration-service — port 3008. Single entry point for all external partner data (webhooks + CSV imports).

request.description:
Creates a new property via webhook. Partner 1 signing secret: 'secret-partner-1'.
Compute HMAC: echo -n '<body>' | openssl dgst -sha256 -hmac 'secret-partner-1'
Leave X-TravelHub-Signature empty to get a 401, or fill in the correct HMAC hex.
Re-send evt-001 with the same eventId — expect {"status":"duplicate"}.
Creates a room under the property created by evt-001. Run after evt-001 succeeds.
Updates price for a seeded room (gran-caribe-deluxe-king-ocean, already in external_id_map). FX_MOCK=true passes amount through unchanged.
Marks gran-caribe-deluxe-king-ocean as unavailable on 2027-06-10 (already in external_id_map).
hotelCode = pms_partner_id (Partner 1). roomCode must match an external_id_map entry (entity_type=room) for that partner. WEBHOOK_SECRET_HOTELBEDS is unset in Docker so signature check is skipped.
propertyCode = pms_partner_id (Partner 1). roomTypeCode must match external_id_map. WEBHOOK_SECRET_TRAVELCLICK is unset so signature check is skipped.
hotelId = pms_partner_id (Partner 1). roomId must match external_id_map. WEBHOOK_SECRET_ROOMRACCOON is unset so signature check is skipped.
